case_title: JACQUES BISCAY et al VS. BERNARD JOSEPH MAYA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,144.00 FILED BY BISCAY, JACQUES BISCAY, LEONIE AS TO DEFENDANT MAYA, BERNARD JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BISCAY, JACQUES AS TO DEFENDANT MAYA, BERNARD JOSEPH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-26-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MAYA, BERNARD JOSEPH
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE BETSY JOHNSON FILED BY BISCAY, JACQUES MAYA, BERNARD JOSEPH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-12-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSON. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSON. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BISCAY, JACQUES BISCAY, LEONIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAYA, BERNARD JOSEPH $1,069.86 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,129.86 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MAYA, BERNARD JOSEPH
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
